title: Remove Third Person
description: A mod that removes third-person functionality from Minecraft
body:
# This is a simple mod that removes the third-person view (F5) from Minecraft.

This client-side mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 disables the ability to change the player's camera perspective (e.g., using the F5 key). Once installed, any input intended to switch the view between first-person, third-person back, or third-person front will have no effect — the perspective remains locked in first-person at all times.

**Features:**
- Completely disables perspective switching.
- Prevents all key inputs related to changing camera view from having any effect.
